# FeetToPixels.com

> FeetToPixels is a free feet to pixels converter and DPI-aware pixel conversion toolkit for signage, print layouts, screen sizing, CSS units, and image dimensions.

All primary tools run in the browser, require no signup, and support practical DPI/PPI workflows for designers, developers, print shops, and sign makers.

## Primary Tool
- [Feet to Pixels Converter](https://www.feettopixels.com/feet-to-pixels): Convert feet to pixels at 72, 96, 150, 300, or custom DPI. Formula: pixels = feet x 12 x DPI.
- [Pixels to Feet Converter](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixels-to-feet): Convert pixel dimensions back to feet for large-format output. Formula: feet = pixels / (DPI x 12).

## Physical Converters
- [Pixels to Inches](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixels-to-inches): Convert pixels to inches at any DPI.
- [Inches to Pixels](https://www.feettopixels.com/inches-to-pixels): Convert inches to pixels at any DPI.
- [CM to Pixels](https://www.feettopixels.com/cm-to-pixels): Convert centimeters to pixels.
- [Pixels to CM](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixels-to-cm): Convert pixels to centimeters.
- [MM to Pixels](https://www.feettopixels.com/mm-to-pixels): Convert millimeters to pixels.
- [Pixels to MM](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixels-to-mm): Convert pixels to millimeters.

## CSS Converters
- [PX to REM](https://www.feettopixels.com/px-to-rem): Convert pixels to rem units.
- [REM to PX](https://www.feettopixels.com/rem-to-px): Convert rem units to pixels.
- [PX to EM](https://www.feettopixels.com/px-to-em): Convert pixels to em units.
- [EM to PX](https://www.feettopixels.com/em-to-px): Convert em units to pixels.
- [PX to PT](https://www.feettopixels.com/px-to-pt): Convert pixels to typographic points.
- [PT to PX](https://www.feettopixels.com/pt-to-px): Convert points to pixels.
- [PX to VW](https://www.feettopixels.com/px-to-vw): Convert pixels to viewport width.
- [VW to PX](https://www.feettopixels.com/vw-to-px): Convert viewport width units to pixels.

## Calculators
- [Pixel Converter Hub](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixel-converter): All-in-one hub for pixel and physical unit conversions.
- [DPI Calculator](https://www.feettopixels.com/dpi-calculator): Calculate dots per inch from pixel dimensions and physical size.
- [PPI Calculator](https://www.feettopixels.com/ppi-calculator): Calculate pixels per inch for displays.
- [DPI Converter](https://www.feettopixels.com/dpi-converter): Understand how DPI changes print dimensions.
- [Aspect Ratio Calculator](https://www.feettopixels.com/aspect-ratio-calculator): Calculate and resize aspect ratios.
- [Image Size Calculator](https://www.feettopixels.com/image-size-calculator): Calculate image dimensions and file size.
- [Screen Resolution Checker](https://www.feettopixels.com/screen-resolution-checker): Detect screen resolution and device pixel ratio.
- [Image DPI Checker](https://www.feettopixels.com/image-dpi-checker): Inspect image DPI and print readiness.
- [Pixel Ruler](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixel-ruler): Measure on-screen elements in pixels.
- [Megapixel Calculator](https://www.feettopixels.com/megapixel-calculator): Convert megapixels to resolution.

## Guides and References
- [Learn Hub](https://www.feettopixels.com/learn): Educational hub for pixel conversion, DPI, PPI, and CSS units.
- [What Is a Pixel?](https://www.feettopixels.com/what-is-a-pixel): Digital pixel basics.
- [What Is DPI?](https://www.feettopixels.com/what-is-dpi): Print resolution explained.
- [What Is PPI?](https://www.feettopixels.com/what-is-ppi): Screen pixel density explained.
- [DPI vs PPI](https://www.feettopixels.com/dpi-vs-ppi): Difference between print dots and screen pixels.
- [Pixels Per Foot](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixels-per-foot): Pixel density per foot at common DPI values.
- [Pixels Per Inch](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixels-per-inch): Pixel density per inch reference.
- [Pixels Per CM](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixels-per-cm): Pixel density per centimeter reference.
- [Pixels Per MM](https://www.feettopixels.com/pixels-per-mm): Pixel density per millimeter reference.
- [Best DPI for Printing](https://www.feettopixels.com/best-dpi-for-printing): DPI recommendations for print types.
- [Best DPI for Web](https://www.feettopixels.com/best-dpi-for-web): Why web images depend on pixel dimensions more than DPI metadata.
- [Paper Sizes in Pixels](https://www.feettopixels.com/paper-sizes-in-pixels): A4, Letter, A3, and other paper sizes at common DPI values.
- [Standard Image Sizes](https://www.feettopixels.com/standard-image-sizes): Photo print sizes in pixels.
- [Social Media Image Sizes](https://www.feettopixels.com/social-media-image-sizes): Current platform image dimensions.
- [Common Resolutions](https://www.feettopixels.com/common-resolutions): HD, 4K, 5K, and 8K reference.
- [DPI Conversion Table](https://www.feettopixels.com/dpi-conversion-table): Quick DPI reference chart.
- [Passport Photo Size](https://www.feettopixels.com/passport-photo-size): Passport and ID photo sizes in pixels.

## Key Facts
- Primary entity: feet to pixels conversion.
- Primary formula: pixels = feet x 12 x DPI.
- At 96 DPI, 1 foot = 1,152 pixels.
- At 150 DPI, 1 foot = 1,800 pixels.
- At 300 DPI, 1 foot = 3,600 pixels.
- The site currently publishes English canonical URLs at root paths.
- Tools are free, browser-based, and do not require file uploads unless a user chooses an image-checking tool.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.feettopixels.com
- Contact: https://www.feettopixels.com/contact
